meaning: adv.另外,否则,不同地,别的方式adj.另外的,其他方面的
examples: Shut the window, otherwise it'll get too cold in here.
This is the one blemish on an otherwise resounding success.
We're committed to the project. We wouldn't be here otherwise.
Bodega Bay is an otherwise unremarkable stop on a remarkable stretch of Hwy 1.
Cow eggs, for instance, can be bought cheaply from slaughterhouses that would otherwise discard them.
